functions.name: applyView
functions.desc: 把平移缩放应用到画布

functions.name: screenToWorld
functions.desc: 屏幕坐标换算成画布坐标

functions.name: refresh
functions.desc: 重画卡片、连线和底部操作条

functions.name: setGraph
functions.desc: 装入一张新项目图并重置视图

functions.name: fitView
functions.desc: 缩放平移到能看到整张图

functions.name: zoomAt
functions.desc: 以某个点为中心缩放画布

functions.name: onDown
functions.desc: 按下鼠标：开始拖卡片或框选

functions.name: onMove
functions.desc: 移动鼠标：拖动卡片或画选框

functions.name: onUp
functions.desc: 松开鼠标：确定选区或落下卡片

functions.name: afterSelectionChange
functions.desc: 选区变化后刷新界面和详情

functions.name: loadText
functions.desc: 识别并载入 graph.json 或 FUNCTIONS.md

functions.name: readFile
functions.desc: 读取用户拖入或选择的文件

functions.name: onPrompt
functions.desc: 把选区和需求编译成指令并复制

functions.name: initApp
functions.desc: 入口：绑定所有按钮和鼠标事件

functions.name: baseName
functions.desc: 取路径最后一段当卡片标题

functions.name: normalizeGraph
functions.desc: 把原始数据统一成画布内部结构

functions.name: markChanges
functions.desc: 把上次改动标记落到文件和函数上

functions.name: parseFunctionsMd
functions.desc: 把 FUNCTIONS.md 注册表解析成图

functions.name: computeLayout
functions.desc: 按层级自动排布卡片和 tools 框

functions.name: layoutBbox
functions.desc: 算所有卡片的外接矩形

functions.name: edgePath
functions.desc: 算两张卡片之间连线的曲线

functions.name: computeFit
functions.desc: 算看全貌所需的缩放和位移

functions.name: buildPrompt
functions.desc: 选区加需求编译成给 AI 的完整指令

functions.name: collectDeps
functions.desc: 找出选区依赖的可复用文件

functions.name: copyFallback
functions.desc: 老浏览器的剪贴板复制兜底

functions.name: esc
functions.desc: 转义 HTML 特殊字符防注入

functions.name: cardHtml
functions.desc: 生成单张功能卡片的 HTML

functions.name: edgesSvgHtml
functions.desc: 生成全部连线，选区相关标红

functions.name: renderWorld
functions.desc: 全量重画整个画布世界

functions.name: renderDetail
functions.desc: 显示单个文件的专业详情面板

functions.name: showToast
functions.desc: 弹出一条短暂的提示消息

functions.name: readSrc
functions.desc: 读取 canvas 源文件文本

functions.name: inlineAssets
functions.desc: 内联 CSS 和 JS，注入版本戳

functions.name: listSourceFiles
functions.desc: 列出要扫描的源码文件

functions.name: parseFunctions
functions.desc: 正则找出文件里的顶层函数

functions.name: buildRows
functions.desc: 汇总函数事实，保留人工标注

functions.name: renderRegistry
functions.desc: 把行渲染成 FUNCTIONS.md 文本

functions.name: buildGraph
functions.desc: 生成画布用的 graph.json 结构

functions.name: diffRows
functions.desc: 对比新旧注册表，打印增删改

functions.name: main
functions.desc: 入口：扫描，写注册表和图，或校验
